---
description: "Reconsider an architecture decision with new technologies, rationales, or constraints. Use when an ADR needs re-evaluation based on new information or alternative approaches."
agent: arch
---

Reconsider the architecture decision in **${input:adr}** from `specs/adr/`.

Evaluate the new input against the original decision drivers and considered options. Research the proposed alternatives using available documentation tools.

If the decision changes, update the existing ADR status to `Superseded` and create a new ADR with the revised decision. If the original decision holds, document why the alternatives were reconsidered and rejected by adding them as additional considered options.
